x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The person or entity who is entitled to redeem rewards, points, or benefits.

Comment:
Example: Cardholder redeeming cashback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The bank or organization that offers the redemption program and manages the rewards or benefits.

Comment:
Example: Bank funding cashback payout.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Program Administrator
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The person or organization responsible for validating redemption requests and authorizing payment to the merchant or beneficiary.

Comment:
Example: Bank debits reward balance and applies statement credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The business or entity where the customer redeems rewards, goods, services, or monetary value.

Comment:
Example: Merchant issuing voucher after points redemption
